name: Venison Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Add the garlic powder, A-1 Sauce, and Worcestershire sauce to the melted butter. Mix well until combined.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then remove from heat.
4. Place the venison steaks on a broiler pan.
5. Brush each side of the steaks with the sauce.
6. Broil for 5 minutes on one side. Turn the steaks and brush the other side with sauce.
7. Continue broiling for an additional 5 minutes or until cooked to desired doneness.
8. Use the sauce generously over the steaks.
